title: Build Real Things With Mistral AI
modules: What Mistral Is and Why Builders Care
Running Mistral Locally and via API
Prompting Mistral for Code, Content, and Data Tasks
Building a Mini Project with Mistral in a Day
Mistral's Limits and When to Use Something Else
synopsis: You don't need Big Tech's permission to build with AI — Mistral gives you powerful open models you can run, tweak, and ship without the usual gatekeeping. This course gets you from zero to a working Mistral-powered project fast, with no fluff.
rationale: Open-weight models like Mistral are reshaping what independent builders can create without corporate API dependency, but most young adults have never heard of them — a gap that limits their technical autonomy.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can set up and query Mistral AI through its API or locally, and ship a small functional project using it as the AI backbone.
source_signals: Open source AI is the path forward
nearest_existing: Code Is Now the Easiest Part
